case_title: CAROL THOMAS VS. U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40.(WAIVE) SERVED JUL-31-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED (REQUEST FORWARDED FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) AS TO THIRD PARTY ABORDO, DANTE U-HAUL - MARKETING COMPANY PRESIDENT HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY THOMAS, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF CAROL THOMAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANTE ABORDO (MARKETING COMPANY PRESIDENT). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, U-HAUL FAILED TO COMPLY WITH B&P CODE 21705 BY FALLING TO PROVIDE NOTICE TO ALTERNATE ADDRESS, RENDERING AUCTION INVALID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY THOMAS, CAROL U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA
